title: Modpack 5.27.2025
description: Somewhat lightweight mod I used to play on.
body:
## Doesn't really need a description.
It's exactly how it sounds. I use this modpack to play something that's still Minecraft, but feels a lot more different. Complete with [Terralith](https://modrinth.com/datapack/terralith) for a whole new journey and an [updated VoxelMap](https://modrinth.com/mod/voxelmap-updated) for an easy way to navigate, as well as some performance mods and QOL tweaks.


## Versions?
1.20.1 on Fabric; my computer is just good _enough_ to handle all of this. I might make a version for 1.21, maybe 1.21.4/1.21.5; if that is, my computer can handle it for testing, and the mods within this are updated.

## Where the links...?
Talk to me about this modpack on Steam at my account [here](https://steamcommunity.com/profiles/76561199690302234), I only put this here because I don't have a discord account.

Apologies for the lack of links, though.

## Extra Information
I have no plans of updating this. If _you_ wanted to, you would have to either make a brand new modpack page or just contact me to add you to the members list. You can give credit if you wish to redistribute this, although it's not needed.
